message:
feat(pt-core): add pre-check safety gates for action execution (sj6.3)

Add PreCheckProvider trait and LivePreCheckProvider implementation for
TOCTOU-safe action pre-checks:

- Protected process detection (patterns, users, PIDs via ProtectedFilter)
- Data-loss gates (open write FDs, locked files, deleted CWD)
- Supervisor detection (systemd, containerd, known supervisors)
- Session safety (session leader detection, active TTY check)

All checks read current process state from /proc at check time for
TOCTOU safety, rather than relying on potentially stale scan data.

Integration into ActionExecutor:
- Optional PreCheckProvider via with_pre_check_provider() builder
- New PreCheckBlocked status variant for blocked actions
- Pre-checks run after identity verification, before execution

Also adds matches_any_pattern() helper to ProtectedFilter for runtime
pattern matching without needing a full ProcessRecord.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
